content_blocks.text: I'll delegate the fetch to a sub-agent with only the web_fetch tool.

input.prompt:
Fetch the page at this exact URL: https://facts.test/reactor

From the fetched content, find and report the Zorblax reactor's operating temperature. Report the temperature exactly as stated on the page, including the units and any surrounding context (e.g. the sentence it appears in). If the page cannot be fetched or the temperature is not present, say so explicitly. Do not guess or infer a value — report only what the page actually says.
input.title: Fetch Zorblax reactor temperature
